title: Jester's Pseudomons [Cobblemon]
description: Adding fakemon I designed for another project to Cobblemon.
body:
An addon to add many of my fakemon ideas. Nearly all of them are animated except 3. I'll add voices and more mons in the future.

(My computer refuses cooperating so I can't add images)

<details>
<summary>Sorbeamy line</summary>
Mainly found in beaches.


Sorbeamy evolves to Gelascoop at level 24
  
Gelascoop evolves to Drakargot at level 50

Gelascoop evolves to Marshelight when fed poisonous food (rotten flesh or black sludge) until 700 points
</details>


<details>
<summary>Boobat line</summary>
Mainly found in forests at night.

  
Boobat evolves to Ghoubat at 160 friendship
</details>


<details>
<summary>Filizzle line</summary>
Mainly found in forests and volcanic areas.
Can spawn in soulsand valleys in the Nether.

  
Filizzle evolves to Pyrolizer at level 16
  
Pyrolizer evolves to Gholizer at level 36

(Maybe try evolving it in a soulsand valley for something interesting?)
</details>

### **How to add into your game**
Put the file in both your worlds datapack and resource pack folder.

Don't forget to activate the resource pack.
